testcase.name: test_call_model_input_filter_can_access_response_format
testcase.failure:
@pytest.mark.asyncio async def test_call_model_input_filter_can_access_response_format() -> None: model = FakeModel() agent = Agent(name="test", model=model) model.set_next_output([get_text_message("ok")])
def filter_fn(data: CallModelData[Any]) -> ModelInputData: assert data.model_data.response_format is None return data.model_data
> await Runner.run( agent, input="start", run_config=RunConfig(call_model_input_filter=filter_fn), )
tests/test_call_model_input_filter.py:52: _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ src/agents/run.py:272: in run return await runner.run( src/agents/run.py:1296: in run turn_result = await model_task ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ src/agents/run_internal/run_loop.py:1843: in run_single_turn new_response = await get_new_response( src/agents/run_internal/run_loop.py:1898: in get_new_response filtered = await maybe_filter_model_input( src/agents/run_internal/turn_preparation.py:76: in maybe_filter_model_input maybe_updated = run_config.call_model_input_filter(filter_payload) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _
data = CallModelData(model_data=ModelInputData(input=[{'content': 'start', 'role': 'user'}], instructions=None), agent=Agent(..._guardrails=[], output_type=None, hooks=None, tool_use_behavior='run_llm_again', reset_tool_choice=True), context=None)
def filter_fn(data: CallModelData[Any]) -> ModelInputData: > assert data.model_data.response_format is None ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E AttributeError: 'ModelInputData' object has no attribute 'response_format'
tests/test_call_model_input_filter.py:49: AttributeError
